title: Vegapunk’s Message Begins
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Dorry, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Bonney as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, nothing like that! We've only got gratitude for him.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: We're Warriors from Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're friends of his, we'll do our best to keep you safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, Sanji, and vegapunk are still back there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: CAN YOU HELP THEM, TOO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those names sure take me back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You betcha, Li'l missy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, he's the one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That scholar mentioned, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Carry them to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll go on ahead! The fire's starting to get out of control!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Giant Allies, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aye-aye, Captains!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are they the "Masters" usopp's always going on about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The line's gone dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did they counter his attack? Or was it the giants???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm heading to the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HOP ON, DOLL! WE'LL ATTACK FROM THE SEA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship on the Northeast shore is definitely from Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OUR FORTUNE KEEPS FLIP-FLOPING. GIANTS ARE NO JOKE! HAVE YOU EVER FOUGHT ONE?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My commanding officer a little over 20 years ago was a giant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PAST TENSE??? YOU MUST BE TALKING ABOUT SAUL. HE WAS A TOUGH COOKIE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where are the others?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In the lab above the clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On a Sky Island?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uh... not exactly. They're just above us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't move?! How're we meant to save you then?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ouch! If you try to move me, I'll die from internal hemorhaging!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we promised to get you off this island,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Didn't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've made my bed... and there are things here I must protect.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I did ask you for that, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping Bonney's command override would've remained a secret till she was a little bit older.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll be a target for the rest of her life... Please, look after her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like he's given up any pretense of looking human...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's a strange look in his eye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Seems he's completely coated in Venom 100?

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
